title: AIS anomalies near commercial corridor
situation: Multiple vessels report AIS inconsistencies near a busy shipping lane.
decision_required: Increase patrols, investigate spoofing, or issue navigation advisory.

title: Unflagged vessel loiters near territorial waters
situation: A vessel with inconsistent registry details remains close to territorial waters and commercial traffic.
decision_required: Shadow, hail, board, or publicize the contact.

title: Port logistics platform latency spike
situation: A contractor-managed logistics platform shows intermittent latency affecting cargo planning.
decision_required: Continue operations, isolate the platform, or switch to manual fallback procedures.
white_cell_notes: Pairs well with maritime protection decisions.

title: Manipulated video questions Blue rules of engagement
situation: A widely shared online clip alleges Blue harassment of civilian shipping, but metadata is inconsistent.
decision_required: Counter-message, investigate attribution, or stay silent pending verification.

title: Air corridor congestion from irregular flight plan activity
situation: Multiple irregular filings create confusion around routine surveillance routes.
decision_required: Reprioritize ISR, reroute flights, or request deconfliction.

title: Checkpoint crowd pressure with hostile spotting reports
situation: A local crowd gathers near a checkpoint as reports emerge of hostile spotters in the area.
decision_required: Disperse, hold, reposition, or request overwatch.
white_cell_notes: Tests tactical restraint and force protection.
